docs.name: Magnetic Button
docs.description: Button that stretches toward the cursor when nearby and snaps back with spring physics.

props.name: children
props.description: The internal content of the button.

props.name: className
props.description: Style overrides appended to the interactive boundary.

props.name: magneticStrength
props.description: Float determining how fast/far the button lerps toward the cursor.

props.name: magneticRadius
props.description: Pixel radius extending outward from the button where gravity begins.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables interaction and magnetic gravitational pull.

docs.overview: MagneticButton adds a physics-based cursor attraction effect to any button or interactive element. As the cursor approaches, the element gently pulls toward it, creating a satisfying tactile feel.

scenarios.title: Primary CTA button
scenarios.description: Apply the magnetic effect to your hero CTA to make it irresistible to click.

scenarios.title: Icon navigation links
scenarios.description: Magnetic icons in a header or dock feel playful and high-quality.

scenarios.title: Reduced-strength subtle hover
scenarios.description: Lower the strength for elements that should feel premium but not distracting.
